word: G4237 - πρασιά - prasiá - pras-ee-ah' - In ranks

sections.paragraph:
πρασιά - prasia - pras-ee-ah'

Perhaps from πράσον prason (a leek, and so an onion patch); a garden plot, that is, (by implication of regular beds) a row (repeated in plural by Hebraism to indicate an arrangement): - in ranks.
